#  Export Specifications as a PDF or CSV 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * The following information is included in your export:
    * Division number and description
    * Section number and description
    * Revision number
    * Issued date
    * Received date
  * If you are looking for a PDF of the original spec book or specifications, click [Open Current Spec Book](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-specifications) or [Open](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-specifications) next to an individual spec section.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. _Optional:_ [Search and Filter for Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-specifications).
  3. Click **Export**.
  4. Click **PDF** or **CSV**.
     * If you are exporting less than 150 specifications to a PDF/CSV, it is automatically be downloaded to your local computer.
     * If you are exporting more than 150 specifications, Procore sends you an email notification when the export is generated. The email includes a link that you can use to download the exported file.


###### Export PDF or CSV for Specification by Area
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click **Specification Areas.**
  3. Click **Export**.
  4. Click **PDF** or **CSV**.   
The system will only download the specifications for the selected area, for example, Building A, Area 02- Current Specifications.


## See Also
  * [View the Deleted Specifications Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-deleted-specifications-report)
  * [Submittal Builder with AI: Generate Submittals from Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-with-ai-generate-submittals-from-specifications)
  * [Which tools can I extract project data from using the Procore Extracts application?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-tools-can-i-extract-project-data-from-using-the-procore-extracts-application)

description: How to export specifications to a PDF or a CSV.
